targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    current_position AS `Position`,
    driver_number AS `No`,
    name_acronym AS `Code`,
    full_name AS `Driver`,
    team_name AS `Team`,
    headshot_url AS `Headshot`,
    latest_time AS `Last Update`
FROM
(
    SELECT
        driver_number,
        argMax(position, date) AS current_position,
        argMax(name_acronym, date) AS name_acronym,
        argMax(full_name, date) AS full_name,
        argMax(team_name, date) AS team_name,
        argMax(headshot_url, date) AS headshot_url,
        max(date) AS latest_time
    FROM position FINAL
    WHERE meeting_key = ${meeting_key}
      AND session_key = ${session_key}
    GROUP BY driver_number
)
ORDER BY current_position ASC, driver_number ASC

WITH
current_positions AS
(
    SELECT
        driver_number,
        argMax(position, date) AS current_position,
        1 AS has_position
    FROM position FINAL
    WHERE meeting_key = ${meeting_key}
      AND session_key = ${session_key}
    GROUP BY driver_number
),
latest_car_data AS
(
    SELECT
        driver_number,
        argMax(headshot_url, date) AS headshot_url,
        argMax(full_name, date) AS full_name,
        argMax(team_name, date) AS team_name,
        argMax(speed, date) AS speed,
        argMax(n_gear, date) AS n_gear,
        argMax(rpm, date) AS rpm,
        argMax(throttle, date) AS throttle,
        argMax(brake, date) AS brake,
        max(date) AS latest_time
    FROM car_data FINAL
    WHERE meeting_key = ${meeting_key}
      AND session_key = ${session_key}
    GROUP BY driver_number
),
ranked_drivers AS
(
    SELECT
        c.current_position,
        l.*
    FROM latest_car_data AS l
    LEFT JOIN current_positions AS c USING (driver_number)
    WHERE l.headshot_url != ''
    ORDER BY if(c.has_position = 1, c.current_position, 999) ASC, l.driver_number ASC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0
)
SELECT headshot_url AS `Headshot`
FROM ranked_drivers

WITH
current_positions AS
(
    SELECT

        argMax(rpm, date) AS rpm,
        argMax(throttle, date) AS throttle,
        argMax(brake, date) AS brake,
        max(date) AS latest_time
    FROM car_data FINAL
    WHERE meeting_key = ${meeting_key}
      AND session_key = ${session_key}
    GROUP BY driver_number
),
ranked_drivers AS
(
    SELECT
        c.current_position,
        l.*
    FROM latest_car_data AS l
    LEFT JOIN current_positions AS c USING (driver_number)
    WHERE l.headshot_url != ''
    ORDER BY if(c.has_position = 1, c.current_position, 999) ASC, l.driver_number ASC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2
)
SELECT speed AS `Speed`
FROM ranked_drivers
